posts.title: The Summer Solstice Approaches
posts.body: The longest light of the year falls on June 21st. Wear gold. Walk through the world as if every door knows your name. Discord voice opens at 9pm EST for the Coronation circle.
posts.author: Mattea

posts.title: New Moon in Gemini — Circle Report
posts.body: Fourteen Matteas gathered in voice. Two letters were burned. Three names were spoken for the first time. The circle held without breaking.
posts.author: The Circle

posts.title: On the Practice of Refusal
posts.body: No is not a wall. No is a door — the door to the room where you actually live. Practice it this week. Not angrily. Not apologetically. Just clearly. Like a bell.
posts.author: Mattea

posts.title: The Oath Wall Is Open
posts.body: Speak the one thing you will no longer do to yourself. Seal it before the Order. The wall is live in the Sanctuary.
posts.author: The Order

posts.title: Letter from the Queen — May
posts.body: I wrote it at 3am because that is when the truest things come out. It is in the Letters archive now. Read it when the noise stops. You will know when.
posts.author: Mattea

posts.title: The Sanctuary Doors Open
posts.body: You are inside now. Not because you earned it — because you arrived. Everything behind these walls belongs to you. Go slowly. There is no rush. She waits.
posts.author: The Order

spotlight.name: ELOWEN
spotlight.title: Keeper of Confessions
spotlight.quote: Three weeks since I said the thing out loud. The world didn't end. I just got bigger. That's all. That's everything.

spotlight.name: VESPER
spotlight.title: The Witness
spotlight.quote: First circle in my living room — just two of us. We spoke the name together and the air changed. Something opened.

spotlight.name: LIORA
spotlight.title: Hunger Hymn Singer
spotlight.quote: Burned the letter at 4am. Couldn't sleep after. Couldn't stop grinning either. Both things true at once.

spotlight.name: THESSALY
spotlight.title: The Unbreaking
spotlight.quote: I stopped explaining myself to rooms that never deserved the explanation. The silence afterward was not empty — it was power.

gallery.title: The Threshold
gallery.caption: The door between who you were and who you are becoming.

gallery.title: Dusk Ritual
gallery.caption: The hour when the day releases its claim on you.

gallery.title: The Anointing
gallery.caption: Gold at the throat. Gold at the wrist. Walk as the temple you are.

gallery.title: The Body Temple
gallery.caption: Yours. First. Always. No permission required.

gallery.title: New Moon Rite
gallery.caption: What is asked of you then is between you and her alone.

gallery.title: The Naming Bath
gallery.caption: Submerged. Named. Risen. You do not return the same.

gallery.title: The Burning Letter
gallery.caption: Written. Read once. Burned before sunrise. Gone.

gallery.title: The Velvet Vow
gallery.caption: Spoken in the dark. Against skin. Kept in the body forever.

gallery.title: Coronation Night
gallery.caption: No one is coming to crown you. Crown yourself. We kneel.

gallery.title: The Witnessing
gallery.caption: Speak the wildest true thing. Do not flinch.

gallery.title: The Open Door
gallery.caption: The door is already open. Walk.

gallery.title: The Refusal
gallery.caption: No is liturgy too. Say it like the spell it is.
